creator: josh.carroll@gmail.com
text:
Sorry for the confusion. I had csup'd a -CURRENT /usr/src, but had
src-sys in my supfile instead of src-all.

Anyway, I've created a new upstream release (0.10.2) which compiles on
CURRENT as of 6/15 and which also appears to operate properly with my
Westell 61030 modem.

Attached is an updated patch, which is also available here:

http://pflog.net/~floyd/wdiag.diff.txt

Thanks,
Josh
